## Summary

Describe the user-visible or maintenance change.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated tests where behavior changed
- [ ] Ran `./gradlew test lintDebug assembleDebug`
- [ ] Confirmed no real contacts, calendars, backups, credentials, or local paths are included
- [ ] Updated user-facing documentation when needed

## Privacy

Explain any data, permission, backup, import, or notification impact. Write `None` when there is no impact.
